title: narcissus macrolobus
intro: Narcissus macrolobus, also known as the many-leaved daffodil or large-flowered narcissus, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Narcissus macrolobus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential in reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
